# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the bead-backed project creation surface by adding `ralph-burning bead create-project <bead-id> [--branch [NAME]] [--flow <preset>]`, wiring it into CLI dispatch, and adding a reusable bead-workflow service that renders prompts through `bead_workflow::project_prompt`, creates projects through the existing project service, optionally creates a derived feature branch, and marks the bead `in_progress` through the br adapter. Added failure handling and unit coverage for missing, closed, blocked, collision, branch/default behavior, and partial-success br update failure cases.","outstanding_risks":["`br lint` could not be run because `br` is not available in PATH, including inside `nix develop`; source validation and `nix build` completed successfully.","The worktree already contains `.beads/issues.jsonl` changes and an untracked `.ralph-burning/projects/d31l-1/` orchestration-state directory; I left those untouched."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the exi
